images.prompt: A raw, ultra‑realistic 8k photograph of a stunning Japanese idol‑style model, 20 ≈ 22 years old, with flawless yet pores‑visible skin, luminous vellus‑hair glow, expressive almond eyes, and straight black silky hair. She sits at a sun‑drenched window seat of a high‑end Tokyo café, softly lit by gentle indoor daylight that wraps the scene in a clean, bright atmosphere. She wears a fitted denim jacket over a cropped, sheer lace‑top that hugs her ample bust and slim waist, its sleeves casually rolled up, revealing a hint of the delicate lace beneath. Her expression is a shy, down‑turned smile, eyes flicking just above the lens as if sharing a secret with the viewer. The background blurs into creamy bokeh, with subtle film‑grain and warm color grading that give a nostalgic, edgy vibe. Shot on Sony A7R IV, 85 mm f/1.4 GM lens, shallow depth of field, global illumination, ray‑traced highlights, creating a cinematic, tactile realism.8k photo, Large breasts

A raw, ultra‑realistic 8k photograph of a stunning Japanese idol‑style model, her straight black hair slightly damp, framed by a fog‑kissed bathroom mirror. She wears a loosely belted midnight‑green trench coat that falls open over a black lace bralette and high‑waisted briefs, the coat’s fabric catching subtle sheen, while her fit, curvy silhouette—slim waist, ample bust, smooth skin with visible pores and delicate vellus hair—is highlighted. Barefoot on cool marble, she leans against a vanity, one hand tucking a strand of wet hair behind her ear, eyes downcast with an innocent, almost playful expression punctuated by a faint, glossy smile. Softbox beauty lighting bathes the scene in a bright, clean glow, leaving no heavy shadows—only a gentle luminous rim on the coat and a warm flush on her cheeks. The eye‑level composition uses an 85mm f/1.4 GM lens on a Sony A7R IV, shallow depth of field f/1.8, creating a creamy bokeh of green‑tinted marble behind her, while global illumination and ray‑tracing render realistic reflections on the steam‑coated glass. Captured in a moody, edgy style that blends danger with allure, the image feels like a high‑fashion editorial moment frozen in time.8k photo, Large breasts
